prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda F6A 660cc turbocharged inline-3 (from the Autozam AZ-1) with a Garrett GT12 turbo upgrade, ported and polished cylinder head, and forged internals (CP pistons, Eagle rods) for 120+ hp at 8,500 RPM on E85 fuel. Custom ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 1500 with individual cylinder tuning and launch control.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 1.5-way LSD for the 5-speed manual transmission, Nismo carbon driveshaft, and a custom 4.1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration. Clutch Masters FX400 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for F6A torque capacity.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (specifically valved for the Carol MeLady’s 2,280mm wheelbase), Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar, and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the front control arms. Custom camber plates for -3.5 degrees front camber to counteract the Kei-car’s natural understeer.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Kei-car widebody kit (Pandem MeLady-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Custom front bumper lip with integrated LED turn signals (Morimoto XB) and a relocated tow hook for aggressive rake.

Work Meister S1 3P 13x6.5 +38 wheels with 165/50R13 Yokohama ADVAN Neova AD08R tires, wrapped in custom gold/pink anodized finish. Rear fender flares rolled and pulled for clearance, with custom inner fender liners (carbon fiber) to reduce weight.

Full interior reupholstery with Bride Low Max seats (custom pink/black Alcantara), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000) welded to the chassis. Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a digital dash (AEM CD-7) replacing the stock cluster.
